guides.title_en: Chongqing's Time Capsule: A Citywalk Through Republican-Era Architecture
guides.subtitle: Chongqing served as China's wartime capital during the Republican era (1912–1949), and it still holds one of the country's richest collections of buildings from that period.

guides.title_en: A Warehouse That Saved a Nation's Treasures
guides.subtitle: On the south bank of the Yangtze in Chongqing, tucked into the old Ciyun Temple neighborhood off Nanbin Road, stands a cluster of plain brick warehouses built into the hillside.
